EUROPEAN CLIMATE ASSESSMENT & DATASET (ECA&D), file created on 02-12-2024
THESE DATA CAN BE USED FREELY PROVIDED THAT THE FOLLOWING SOURCE IS ACKNOWLEDGED:

Klein Tank, A.M.G. and Coauthors, 2002. Daily dataset of 20th-century surface
air temperature and precipitation series for the European Climate Assessment.
Int. J. of Climatol., 22, 1441-1453.
Data and metadata available at http://www.ecad.eu

FILE FORMAT (MISSING VALUE CODE IS -9999):

01-06 SOUID: Source identifier
08-15 DATE : Date YYYYMMDD
17-21 RR   : precipitation amount in 0.1 mm
23-27 Q_RR : Quality code for RR (0='valid'; 1='suspect'; 9='missing')

This is the blended series of station FRANCE, PAMIERS (STAID: 792).
Blended and updated with sources: 104887 
See file sources.txt and stations.txt for more info.
